ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the instrument during the trading day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the instrument during the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded for the financial instrument */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Current trading status of the financial instrument */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the financial instrument */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument matures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price level, technical indicator) */,
  "price_level" TEXT /* Price level for the alert */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was set up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, trend analysis) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used to generate the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
